summary: Restored the last Dataset Viewer project from local AppData before loading project-specific server preferences.
details: Standalone Dataset Viewer and DFM tabs now remember the last selected Project Name in %APPDATA%\ArcRho\local_project_prefs.json. Dataset Viewer then loads that project's server-side user preferences to restore the related Reserving Class and Dataset Name; if no last project is available, the Project field stays blank.
